message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "clause_text": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "clause_name": "Termination for Non-Delivery",
      "clause_type": "termination",
      "summary": "Allows Company to cancel the Phase Agreement if Developer fails to deliver completed programs within a specified timeframe.",
      "risk_level": "high",
      "impact": "Potential loss of investment and resources for Company if Developer fails to deliver.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Define clear timelines and penalties for non-delivery in the agreement.",
        "Consider including a grace period before cancellation rights are triggered."
      ]
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Failure by Developer to deliver the completed programming by the end of the ………… [insert number] days after the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement will entitle Company to a ……. [insert number] % reduction in the cost of the entire Phase for each ……. [insert number] day period in which Developer is late.",
      "clause_name": "Penalty for Late Delivery",
      "clause_type": "liability",
      "summary": "Imposes financial penalties on Developer for late delivery of programming.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Encourages timely delivery but may lead to disputes over what constitutes 'late'.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Clearly define the terms of late delivery and the calculation of penalties.",
        "Ensure both parties agree on the definition of delivery timelines."
      ]
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Upon passing the acceptance test, Company shall pay to Developer an additional ……. [insert number] % of the price of the phase.",
      "clause_name": "Payment upon Acceptance",
      "clause_type": "payment",
      "summary": "Specifies payment terms contingent upon the successful passing of acceptance tests.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Aligns Developer's incentives with quality delivery but may delay payments.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Establish clear criteria for acceptance tests to avoid disputes.",
        "Consider partial payments for milestones reached prior to final acceptance."
      ]
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test.",
      "clause_name": "Acceptance Test Failure Procedure",
      "clause_type": "dispute resolution",
      "summary": "Outlines the procedure to follow if the software fails acceptance testing.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Provides a structured approach to resolving issues but may lead to delays.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure both parties understand the notification and remediation process.",
        "Set clear timelines for remediation to avoid prolonged disputes."
      ]
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Upon receipt of said programming specifications, Company will either approve or disapprove of said specifications. Such approval will be at the sole discretion of Company.",
      "clause_name": "Approval of Specifications",
      "clause_type": "ownership",
      "summary": "Gives Company the sole discretion to approve or disapprove programming specifications.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Empowers Company but may lead to delays if specifications are not approved promptly.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Establish a timeline for approval to ensure project momentum.",
        "Consider a collaborative approach to specification development to minimize disapproval."
      ]
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Developer shall provide and deliver to Company custom software in regards thereto as outlined in Clause 3.",
      "clause_name": "Delivery of Custom Software",
      "clause_type": "other",
      "summary": "Obligates Developer to deliver custom software as per the agreement.",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "impact": "Clarifies Developer's obligations but lacks specific performance metrics.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Include specific performance metrics and timelines for delivery.",
        "Define what constitutes 'custom software' to avoid ambiguity."
      ]
    }
  ]
}
